claim_bullets.bullet_text: The sample edition includes only a portion of the complete book (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.16-17).
The author does not have free coffee (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.16-17).
Buying the book in progress entitles you to free updates (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.16-17).

source_record_text: This page summarizes the key information from the sample PDF about the book's edition and purchasing details.
